name: assimilate-harness-capability
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

params.instruction: Analyze the CLI tool's help output. Generate a strict JSON object representing a Harness Capability Registry entry for this tool. The output MUST be raw JSON without markdown code blocks. Structure: { capability_id (e.g. cli.native.{{tool_name}}), source: { type: 'cli_native', provider: 'host-env', name: '{{tool_name}}', version: 'v1' }, kind (e.g. deterministic_utility), interaction_mode (e.g. deterministic_task), risk_class (low/medium/high), replayability (deterministic/partial), approval_hooks: { requires_pre_approval: boolean, approval_scope: string }, preferred_usage: { workflow_shapes: string[], intents: string[] }, fallback_path: { mode: 'kyberion_local_actuator', target: 'system-actuator' }, status: 'experimental', notes: string }. Do NOT wrap in ```json ... ```.
